description: T1/T2 기본 파이프라인 완성 후 다음 레벨 로드맵 — 15+N 확장 가능
prerequisite: T1 463 tok/s PASS + T2 7.02h/1B PASS (2026-04-11 ossified)
h100_quota_ref: shared/roadmaps/p5_zeta.json#goal — ML 로드맵 작업은 H100 1대 추가 가능 (기본 2대 + ML 1대 = 총 3대까지 자동 발사 허용)

auto_push_policy.description: ML 로드맵 항목 완료 시 해당 산출물을 자동 git commit + push — anima docker가 git pull hexa-lang으로 다음 pod 재시작 시 자동 반영
auto_push_policy.exclude: 무관 WIP (self/build_c.hexa, self/codegen_c2.hexa, self/runtime.c, self/ml/distributed*.hexa 수정분 등 이번 사이클 외 변경)
auto_push_policy.batch_mode: 동시 완료된 다수 항목은 한 commit으로 묶어서 push (제목: 'ml: #A/#B/... 구현 (N tests PASS)')
auto_push_policy.commit_msg_template:
ml: #{id} {name} 구현 ({tests_passed} tests PASS)

- self/ml/{file}.hexa
- self/test_{file}.hexa
- SSOT id={id} todo→done
auto_push_policy.no_confirm: 자동 실행, 사용자 질의 없음 (GO 모드/ml go 경로 포함)
auto_push_policy.blocking: pre-commit hook 실패 시 원인 고치고 재시도. --no-verify 금지. L0 가드는 shared/rules/lockdown.json 준수. hook 실패 후 --amend 금지 (새 commit 생성)
auto_push_policy.docker_reflect: push → runpodctl pod 재시작 또는 신규 pod 생성 시 entrypoint_steps의 'git pull hexa-lang'이 자동 pull → anima/training이 import 'ml/{name}.hexa'로 즉시 사용 가능

items.name: Local SGD / FedAvg
items.description: 노드 로컬 K step 후 주기적 aggregate
items.summary: Linear-regression mean-squared-error loss on multi-node partitions + per-node K local SGD steps + uniform parameter averaging (Local SGD) + sample-count-weighted average w_k = n_k/N (FedAvg) + round/rounds training loops with loss history. Uniform counts make FedAvg ≡ Local SGD. 19 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: DARTS NAS
items.summary: Mixed-op edge y = Σ softmax(α)_k · op_k(feat) with K=2 ops (linear + tanh) + stable softmax + analytic softmax backward (s_j·(g_j−g·s)) + inner-loop W SGD on train MSE + outer-loop α SGD on val MSE (first-order DARTS) + bilevel alternating search loop + argmax discretization. On linear target dataset architecture converges to linear op (α[0] > α[1]). 23 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Once-For-All Network
items.description: 단일 슈퍼넷 학습, 다중 서브넷 프루닝 배포
items.summary: Supernet with elastic kernels {3,5,7} + elastic depth {2,3,4} + elastic widths {0.25,0.5,0.75,1.0}. Per-layer ReLU(W·h+B) with active width = ⌈width_max·wm⌉, kernel averaged over k cyclic taps, depth truncation. Sandwich rule samples smallest + largest + 2 random subnets per step and averages MSE loss. Finite-diff gradient updates only W. 28 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Wasserstein Loss
items.description: OT 기반 분포 매칭 손실 (Sinkhorn div)
items.summary: Squared-Euclidean cost matrix + K = exp(-c/ε) kernel + iterative Sinkhorn u=a/(Kv), v=b/(K^T u) + transport plan γ = u_i K_ij v_j + row/col marginal extraction + entropic W² = <γ,c> + debiased Sinkhorn divergence S_ε = W(μ,ν) - ½W(μ,μ) - ½W(ν,ν) ≥ 0 + weight normalization. 18 tests ALL PASS including marginal preservation and S(μ,μ) ≈ 0.

items.name: Sinkhorn Network
items.summary: Differentiable Sinkhorn normalization layer: P₀ = exp(M/τ) then alternating row/col normalize to produce doubly stochastic matrix (soft permutation), low-τ→hard permutation (Gumbel-Sinkhorn trick), high-τ→uniform, greedy hungarian_from_soft, permutation Frobenius loss, matching score <P,cost>, matrix entropy. 22 tests ALL PASS — verified doubly-stochastic convergence (tol 1e-3), diagonal recovery for distinct row maxima, entropy ordering soft>hard.

items.name: MAE Masked Autoencoder
items.summary: 8×8 image → 4 patches (P=4, 16 pix each) + pseudo-random permutation mask keeping 25% (75% drop) + linear patch embed → encoder (linear+GELU+linear, D=8) → fill mask tokens at dropped positions (learnable mask_token) → decoder (linear to 16 pix) → MSE loss on masked patches only. 28 tests ALL PASS: patchify round-trip, deterministic mask per seed, disjoint keep/mask partition, zero-loss on identity recon.

items.name: Influence Functions
items.description: 예측 영향 훈련 샘플 추적 (Hessian inv)
items.summary: Logistic regression with closed-form gradient (p−y)·x + diagonal Hessian H_ii = (1/N)·Σ p(1−p)·x_i² + damping + H⁻¹ approximation via componentwise division + Koh-Liang influence I(z_test, z_train) = −∇L(z_test)ᵀ·H⁻¹·∇L(z_train) + ranking helper sorts training samples by |influence| descending + tiny logreg trainer converges on 6-point linearly-separable toy. 23 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Membership Inference Defense
items.summary: 5 defenses — temperature softening (T softmax), label smoothing ε/K, Gaussian output perturbation, top-k confidence masking, MemGuard-lite max-cap τ — plus baseline attacker (max_p > threshold) and attack_accuracy evaluator. 19 tests PASS — defense lowers attack accuracy from base level.

items.name: Homomorphic Inference
items.summary: Shift/scale ciphertext sim + hom_add / hom_scale / hom_add_plain / hom_mul (rescaled) + CryptoNets-style polynomial ReLU (0.125z²+0.5z+0.25) + polynomial sigmoid + 2-layer hom_forward — plaintext and ciphertext forward pipelines match within 1e-3. 19 tests PASS — round-trip ~0, add/mul/relu/forward equivalences verified.

items.name: Reservoir Computing ESN
items.summary: Jaeger ESN — seeded U(-1,1) W_in + sparse W_res rescaled to target spectral radius via power iteration, leaky state x(t+1)=(1-α)x(t)+α·tanh(W_in u+W_res x), ridge-regression readout W_out = Y^T X (X^T X+λI)^{-1}, Gauss-Jordan inverse. 14 tests PASS — echo-state decay, spectral radius fit, training MSE low, input sensitivity.

items.name: Domain Adaptation DANN
items.summary: Feature extractor (tanh MLP) + softmax label classifier + sigmoid domain classifier, manual backprop with gradient reversal (−λ scale on domain → feature gradient path). 17 tests PASS — source loss decreases with training, source accuracy improves. NOTE: @hot on mutation-heavy train step triggers slot-aliasing bug (feedback_hot_attr_dict_mutation) so attribute omitted.

items.name: Differential Transformer
items.description: diff attention: 두 softmax 차분으로 노이즈 제거
items.summary: Differential attention: Q,K split into halves, A = softmax(Q1*K1^T/sqrt(d)) - lambda*softmax(Q2*K2^T/sqrt(d)), learnable lambda (init 0.5, clamped [0,1]). Xavier init, numerical-gradient SGD training. 19 tests PASS.

items.name: COCONUT Latent CoT
items.description: 잠재 공간 연쇄 추론 (토큰 없는 사고)

items.name: Paged Attention
items.description: 가상 메모리 방식 KV 블록 관리
items.summary: vLLM-style virtual memory KV-cache manager. pa_ prefix API: init, alloc/free block, write/read KV, sequence management, append_token (auto-alloc), online-softmax attention, COW fork for beam search, usage stats. @pure for attention/read, @hot for write. 43 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: DeepSeek-V2 MoE
items.summary: DeepSeek-V2 MoE with shared experts + fine-grained top-K routing. dsmoe_ prefix API: init, route (softmax gating + top-K), expert_forward (2-layer ReLU FFN), shared_forward (always-on experts), forward (combined), balance_loss (load balancing), full_gate, train_step (numerical gradient MSE + balance). @pure for forward/routing/loss, @hot for train. 28 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: IP-Adapter
items.summary: Decoupled cross-attention IP-Adapter: image projection (D_image->D_model), text/image cross-attn paths, lambda-controlled combination, adapter-only training (text weights frozen). 21 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Energy-Based Model
items.summary: Energy-Based Model with 2-layer MLP energy network, finite-difference score function, Langevin MCMC sampling (single-step + multi-step), contrastive divergence loss and training with analytic gradients. Box-Muller for Gaussian noise. @pure for energy/score/loss, @hot for train_step. 21 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Native Sparse Attention
items.summary: DeepSeek/NSA block-sparse attention: block decomposition + lightweight scorer + top-K selection + sliding window + global tokens + 3-branch combine. Analytical gradients for output projection + numerical gradients with clipping for V projection. 36 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: CPU/GPU Offloading
items.summary: Layer-wise CPU/GPU offloading with prefetch pipeline, KV cache offload, eviction, memory budget tracking, numerical gradient training. 32 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: AnimateDiff
items.summary: AnimateDiff motion module: temporal PE (sinusoidal), temporal self-attention across frames, motion module (attn + FF + residual), frozen spatial blocks, diffusion loss (MSE), motion-only training via numerical gradient (fresh-dict perturbation, no @hot dict mutation). 28 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Iterative DPO
items.summary: Iterative DPO (Xu et al., 2024) with 2-layer MLP policy, self-play generation (K=4 candidates), reward head, DPO loss with analytical gradients through full backprop, iterative reference update each round. @pure for forward/log_prob/reward/dpo_loss, @hot for train_step/iterate. 34 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: Latent Consistency Model
items.description: LCM 잠재 일관성 증류 (1~4 step 생성)

items.name: StreamingLLM
items.description: attention sink + 슬라이딩 윈도우 무한 생성
items.summary: StreamingLLM (Xiao et al. 2023): attention sink (first K tokens) + sliding window (last W tokens), constant KV memory K+W. sllm_init/create_cache/append_token/attention/forward_token/forward_stream/train_step. 52 tests ALL PASS.

items.name: KV Compression
items.summary: Low-rank projection (W_down/W_up) + uniform quantization. kvc_init/compress/decompress/quantize/dequantize/compress_quantize/attention/error/train_step. @pure forward, @hot training. 27 tests ALL PASS.

workflow_rules.status_lifecycle: todo → running (agent 발사 시 마킹) → done (완료 시 전이) | todo → partial (부분 실패)
workflow_rules.display_note: ml list 표시 시 done + running 항목 모두 제외, 표시 대상이 20개 미만이면 동일 표 안에 상태='제안' 행으로 채움
go_cycle_flow: 2. 각 클러스터를 bg Agent에 발사하며 해당 항목들 status=running + running_agent_id/since/cluster 기록
3. Agent 완료 시 각 항목 status=done 전이, running_* 필드 제거 또는 completed_at 기록
workflow_rules.recorded_reason: 사용자 지시: ml list 출력 시 running(bg 진행중) 항목도 제외. SSOT에 직접 기록하여 모든 사이클이 규칙 공유.
